content:
通关序章后，守密人将解锁全新邀请活动「弥萨格入学邀约」，并在活动中获得专属「邀请码」。
**邀请新人填写邀请码共计可获得：简约幻衣「朵尔·灵性重生」1、「银芯」1200。**

✦ 通过序章后的7天内，可输入其他守密人邀请码，完成后可立即获得「银芯」300；
✦ 每位守密人至多可邀请50位新人，且受邀的守密人调查等级需至少达到5级，否则将不计为有效人数；
✦ 每位守密人只可接受1位守密人的邀请；
✦ 在V2.3.1版本更新前已通关序章的守密人，在更新后首次登录的7天内，可输入其他守密人的邀请码。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The "Mythag Enrollment Invite" event becomes available after you complete the Prologue.
Participate to get your unique Invitation Code, then share it with new Keepers! 
**Participate in the event to get a total of: Basic Skin "Doll: Gnostic Reshape"1 and Silver 1200.**

✦New Keepers can also get rewards!  Within 7 days of completing the Prologue, you can enter one invitation code from another Keeper to get Silver300. 
✦You can invite a maximum of 50 new Keepers. To be counted as a valid recruit, an invited Keeper must use your code and reach Keeper Level 5. 
✦A Keeper can only accept one invitation. 
✦Keepers who completed the Prologue before the V2.3.1 update can still participate and enter an invitation code within 7 days of their first login after the update.
thread_title: V2.3.1 「朵尔·灵性重生」简约幻衣，可在邀请活动中获取┊Get Basic Skin "Doll: Gnostic Reshape" from the New Invitation Event!

content:
大家的性格本色深深地打动了面试官，恭喜全员通过第一轮笔试！接下来是第二轮测试：

📋️**入团第2步：射击测试**
团长凯蒂古拉手持双枪、弹无虚发，那伟岸的身姿激励着每一位团员不断自我鞭策！
靶纸上印着我们痛恨的敌人，一个卑劣的坏蛋！用你心中最爆裂的怒火击穿它吧——

🎁 **测试奖励：**
在评论区分享测试结果，超过20位守密人射中10环，团长将送出一份“200银芯兑换码”的参与奖励。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

You have impressed the recruiters—congrats on passing the psychological assessment! Now, time for Round 2:

📋 **Step 2: Marksmanship Test**
Lady Kathigu-Ra never misses—dual shotguns, deadly precision. Her legend pushes every recruit to their limits!
Your target? The face of our most hated enemy: a worthless scumbag! Let your rage fuel the perfect shot.

🎁 **Reward Challenge:**
Drop your test results in the comments! If 20+ Keepers land a bullseye, Kathigu-Ra will drop a 200*Silver prize code!
thread_title: V2.3.1 佣兵团招新：射击实战“击毙吧！坏蛋”┊Mercenary Live Fire Test: "Take the Shot, Scumbag!"

content:
自太阳再次升起的那刻起，混沌的欢愉将注定无所遁形。
***“我会找到他的，无论他藏到宇宙中哪一个角落，我终会找到他的。”***

凯蒂古拉周身的火焰嗡鸣着升腾爆起，
在灼热的疯狂下，漆黑的腥臭恶意顷刻便燃烧殆尽——
***“当我找到他时，我会把这世间一切的欢悦和欣愉，都拖进炼狱中焚烧。”***

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

When sun’s fires rekindle, wicked bliss of chaos will have nowhere to hide.
***“I’ll find Him. Doesn’t matter where in this rotten universe He’s hiding, that filthy rat’s gonna pay.”***

Fires of Kathigu-Ra hummed and surged. In a searing, primal madness, the inky, stinking malice of the Aeon of Rapture was incinerated in an instant—
***“When I find Him, I will drag every bit of His glee and triumph in this world into my eternal inferno, and watch it all burn.”   ***
thread_title: V2.3.1 凯蒂古拉情报2：火焰将清算一切┊About Kathigu-Ra: Flames Will Consume All
